title: EndpointType uri mapping duplicated across as_uri and from_uri
description: types.rs: EndpointType::as_uri() and EndpointType::from_uri() are two parallel match blocks over the same 7-variant set. Adding a new variant requires editing both methods in sync; the relationship between string and variant is stated twice. Suggested rewrite: define a const table const ENDPOINT_URIS: &[(EndpointType, &str)] = &[(EndpointType::Vtc, "urn:jmap:chat:cap:vtc"), ...]; then implement as_uri() and from_uri() as linear scans over that table. The table is the single source of truth; both methods become mechanical traversals.
close_reason: Opinion: parallel match vs const table per SEC7; idiomatic Rust uses parallel match
